# Chapter 5: Energy methods  (~90 pp)
- 5.1 Energy as a unifying currency (10) · 5.2 Conservation of energy in mechanics (12) · 5.3 Lagrangian mechanics introduced (15) · 5.4 Generalised coordinates and constraints (12) · 5.5 Hamilton's principle (10) · 5.6 Worked examples: pendulum, double pendulum, sliding bead (15) · 5.7 Failure section: missing degrees of freedom in dynamic analysis (16)

**Archetype**: balance, optimisation. **Project**: derive the equations of motion of a double pendulum two ways (Newton, Lagrange); reconcile. **Exercises**: 30.
